    Represents a Cobblestone block in the game world.

    Constructs CobbleStonePane with gray background and cobblestone texture.

    create() - Method in class tailFinder.view.game.VisibleGridSteve
    Creates a 15x9 grid of dummy panes and positions Steve in the center (column 7, row 3-4).

    Creates a new map from the map pattern file corresponding to the difficulty level.
